new_value: {"notes":"FIXED: nucleo_wl55jc puck board config now enables CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP=y and CONFIG_SPI=y. SPI is required for Zephyr to retain CONFIG_LORA_STM32WL_SUBGHZ_RADIO and instantiate the chosen physical radio; CoAP is required by puck L2 sources. Added canonical Nucleo puck row to .github/workflows/ci.yml. Validation: SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=$(git log -1 --format=%ct) west build -p always -b nucleo_wl55jc -s lichen/apps/puck -d \u003ctemp\u003e/fix-now-puck-nucleo-physical -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen completed and linked. Resolved config: SPI=y, SPI_STM32=y, LORA_STM32WL_SUBGHZ_RADIO=y, LICHEN_L2=y, LICHEN_COAP=y, LICHEN_COAP_CLIENT=y. Memory: flash 133340 B/256 KB, RAM 50228 B/64 KB. ELF SHA-256 7c527d92f1af10e5dbd66b67c0434703b9cc032778709ebc615c4a29e75a7648. CI YAML parse and git diff --check passed; two independent reviews found no issues."}
Enabled canonical Nucleo puck CoAP and SPI dependencies, added CI hardware build coverage, and verified a pristine physical-board link with expected config and clean independent reviews.
